notes: Resolutions determined via web research on March 25, 2026. Only includes questions with confident, verifiable outcomes.

resolutions.question: Will gas prices in the US reach a new all-time high before April 2026?
resolutions.reasoning: All-time record is $5.02/gal (June 2022). Current price ~$3.96/gal as of March 23, 2026. Only 6 days remain before April. Mathematically impossible to close $1.06 gap. RESOLUTION: NO.

resolutions.question: Will Donald Trump and Xi Jinping meet in person before April 3, 2026?
resolutions.reasoning: White House confirmed March 25 that Trump-Xi summit moved to May 14-15 in Beijing. Original March 31-April 2 dates cancelled due to Iran war. RESOLUTION: NO.

resolutions.question: Will Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Vladimir Putin meet in person before [deadline]?
resolutions.reasoning: Wikipedia confirms '2026 United States-Ukraine-Russia meetings in Geneva'. PBS reports Putin and Zelensky had first one-on-one meeting. RESOLUTION: YES. Our 16.5% was badly wrong — this is our worst miss.

resolutions.question: Will Cloudflare experience another critical incident before May 2026?
resolutions.reasoning: Multiple confirmed incidents: WAF global outage March 3 (89 min), Dashboard/API outage March 18, Pages API errors March 19. RESOLUTION: YES. Our 64.9% was reasonable.

resolutions.question: Will any AI model achieve a score of 95% or higher on the GPQA Diamond?
resolutions.reasoning: Artificial Analysis leaderboard shows GPT-5.4 at 97%, Claude Opus 4.6 at 95% on GPQA Diamond. Multiple models have crossed 95%. RESOLUTION: YES. Our 72.2% was decent but under-confident.

resolutions.question: [RESTATED] - moved question
resolutions.reasoning: Question was restated/moved. Should be excluded from Brier calculation.

resolutions.reasoning: Question was moved. Should be excluded from Brier calculation.

not_yet_resolvable.note: Iran says boycotting US but not WC. Still unfolding. Tournament starts June 2026.

not_yet_resolvable.question: US ground invasion of Iran before May 2026
not_yet_resolvable.note: Active war with air campaign + troop deployment. No ground invasion yet but situation escalating daily.

not_yet_resolvable.question: 1kt meteor strike March/April 2026
not_yet_resolvable.note: No 1kt strike in March so far. April still remaining.

not_yet_resolvable.question: Gas prices all-time high before April
not_yet_resolvable.note: RESOLVED NO above. Only 6 days left, $1.06 gap.

not_yet_resolvable.question: US measles elimination status
not_yet_resolvable.note: PAHO review in November 2026. Official status not yet changed.

not_yet_resolvable.question: Pam Bondi out before May 2026
not_yet_resolvable.note: Still serving as AG. Deadline is May.
